additional_metadata.organizer: dbt Labs Community Team (Emceed by Bolaji Oyejide, Community Team)
additional_metadata.venue_host: Fullsteam Brewery @ Boxyard RTP (Top Box, 2nd floor)

events.agenda: 5:30-6:00 Check in/Registration; 6:00-6:05 Welcome Remarks; 6:05-6:35 Presentation by Savannah Chunn-Allnutt on the Power of CI/CD in Data Transformation; 6:35-6:45 Q&A; 6:45-6:50 Closing Remarks + call for speakers; 6:50-8:00 Networking & Reception.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Boxyard RTP, 842-898 Park Offices Dr, Morrisville, NC
events.raw_text: Wed, Jan 22, 2025, 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM EST. Presentation by Savannah Chunn-Allnutt (dbt Labs) on the Power of CI/CD in Data Transformation: incorporating a dbt CI job and Advanced CI insight into your development flow to minimize bugs found in production.

talks.description: The power of CI/CD in data transformation: incorporating a dbt CI job and Advanced CI insight into your development flow to minimize bugs found in production.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 6:05 - 6:35 | Presentation by Savannah Chunn-Allnutt (dbt Labs) on the Power of CI/CD in Data Transformation (30 min)
talks.title: The Power of CI/CD in Data Transformation
